panels.description: snmpEngineTime - management/SNMP plane uptime, not the real chassis uptime.
panels.title: Uptime (management/SNMP)

panels.description: Extracted from sysDescr (first token). Raises an INFO trigger on change.
panels.title: Firmware version

panels.description: Operational default: PROTECT. INFO trigger if it leaves this mode.
panels.title: Chassis FAN mode

panels.description: Computed in Grafana: used/total per board (Zabbix calculated item does not resolve LLD siblings in this instance).
panels.title: Memory usage (%) per board

panels.description: Shows only cages with a module present.
panels.title: LOS

panels.description: NUMACTIVEONTS - ONTs that passed traffic in the interval, not an inventory count.
panels.title: Active ONTs per PON
PON port status (oper)
panels.description: ifOperStatus per PON port. NOTE: on this ISAM a port reads DOWN when ALL its ONTs are down; an empty port reads UP.

panels.title: Provisioned ONUs per PON
panels.description: Provisioned (configured) ONUs per port, not active ones. Warning trigger at {$PON.ONU.WARN}; GPON limit is {$PON.ONU.MAX}=128.

panels.title: PON port admin status
panels.description: ifAdminStatus per PON port. Distinguishes an administratively disabled port from an operational fault.
